name: @wcohen/worker-router
description: Web Worker / worker_threads pool with Comlink RPC and multiple handler modules per worker; one API for browser and Node

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && (cd src/cljc && npx squint compile pool.cljc) && npx esbuild src/cljc/pool.mjs --bundle --format=esm --external:comlink --external:squint-cljs/* --external:node:* --outfile=dist/index.mjs && cp src/worker-bootstrap.mjs dist/worker-bootstrap.mjs && cp src/index.d.ts dist/index.d.ts
scripts.pretest: npm run build && (cd test/cljc && npx squint compile pool_test.cljc)

author: Will Cohen
